title: Cassandra Schultz
compiled_truth: Cassandra Schultz is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-15 to 2001-11-30), Cassandra Schultz sent 67 and received 416 emails, totalling 483 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (32), [David Port](people/david-port) (25), [Shona Wilson](people/shona-wilson) (20), [Ted Murphy](people/ted-murphy) (18), [Chris Abel](people/chris-abel) (15). Mailbox folders observed: archive, brokerage_agreements, deleted_items, inbox, older_than_30, projects.
